positive: An intricate, stylized illustration of a celestial forest grove at dusk. The main subject is a group of bioluminescent fantasy flora and fauna—humming crystal-winged moths, glowing oversized mushrooms, and gentle, winged cervids—set within a symmetrical, circular composition. The style is clean graphic illustration with bold outlines, inspired by Art Nouveau and modern woodblock prints. Use a limited, complementary color palette: deep indigos, sapphire blues, emerald greens, and touches of glowing lavender and gold. High contrast is crucial, emphasizing negative space and clean silhouettes for optimal print visibility on apparel. Dramatic volumetric lighting emanating from the bioluminescent elements, creating depth and mystery. Perfect for a centered print graphic.
negative: low detail, blurry, noisy, text, signature, watermark, writing, out of focus, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, monochrome, gradient, messy, realistic photograph
